What is Stupid Zombies 2?

Stupid Zombies 2 is a physics-based puzzle game where you play as a survivor trying to make your way through a zombie-infested city. Your goal is to use an arsenal of crazy and silly guns to blast your way through hordes of undead.

The game features a unique blend of action, strategy, and humor, making it a standout title in the puzzle genre. With its colorful graphics and addictive sound effects, Stupid Zombies 2 is the perfect game to play when you need a break from the stresses of everyday life.

How to Play Stupid Zombies 2

To play Stupid Zombies 2, simply use your mouse to aim and fire your guns at the zombies. The controls are simple and intuitive, making it easy to pick up and play. On mobile devices, you can use touch controls to swipe and tap your way through the game.

As you progress through the game, you'll encounter new guns and power-ups that will help you take down the zombies. But be careful, as the game gets progressively harder as you advance. You'll need to use your wits and strategy to survive and progress through the levels.

Stupid Zombies 2 Controls

Here's a breakdown of the controls for Stupid Zombies 2:

  • Mouse: Aim and fire guns
  • Mouse wheel: Switch between guns
  • Right-click: Zoom in and out
  • Mobile touch controls: Swipe to aim, tap to fire

Stupid Zombies 2 Tips and Tricks

Here are some tips and tricks to help you get started and improve your gameplay:

  • Start with the basic guns and upgrade as you progress through the game.
  • Use the environment to your advantage - shoot zombies into lava pits or off cliffs to take them out quickly.

For beginners, it's essential to start with the basic guns and upgrade as you progress through the game. This will help you develop a solid foundation and improve your chances of surviving the early levels.

It's also a great option for players who want to play a game without having to download any software or plugins.
